title: USB C Charger Cable 1.5 Meter USB A to USB C Type C Charger Fast Charging 3A Lead Nylon Braided for iPhone 15 Series Samsung Galaxy S22 S21 S20 Pixel 8 7 6 PS5 Z Flip 4 Z Flip 3 Huawei Switch
features: 【Perfect Compatibility】- Technovate USB Type C cable can fast charge any phone but especially made for Samsung and For iPhone to 80% in 1 Hour, perfectly compatible with iPhone15/Plus/Pro/Pro Max Samsung Galaxy S24 S23 S22/S21/S20/S20e/S10/S10 Plus/S10e/S9/S9 +/S8/S8 +/Note 9/Note 8/a51/A50/A12/A21s/A20e/A70/A40/A41/A42/A8 2018/A7 2017/A5 2017/A3 2017 For Huawei P20/P20 Pro/P10/P9/P30/P30 Pro/P40/Mate 20/Mate 20 Pro/Mate 20 RS/Mate 20 X For Honor 8/10/20/V10 For Sony Xperia XZ/Xa1/Z5 For PS5

【3A High Speed Sync & Charge】: Charger Cable output power up to 3A, which is ensured by high-speed safe charging, and supports data transfer speed can reach 40~60MB/S (480Mbps). This USB Type C Cable ensures that your devices are loaded and charged safely and faster at maximum speed.

【Nylon Braided USB Type C Cable 】: Strong military nylon fibre, the most flexible, powerful and durable material, makes tensile force increased by 300%. Built-in laser welding technology ensure the metal part won't break. The longer SR anti-break design enhances the durability of the cable. With 20,000+ times bend test, the flexible and durable double-braided nylon usb type C cable charger longer service life and will never rupture.

【Multiple Protection】- Technovate USB Type c charger cable fast charging lead has electronic safety certifications that comply with appropriate Euorpean standards. The built-in smart chip of our USB Type C Cable can automatically detect the device and provide stable voltage. Technovate USB C Cable charging lead has multiple protection functions such as over-heat protection, over-voltage protection, and over-charge protection to ensure safe charging of the device.

【What you get】- You get 1.5 Meter nylon braided USB Type C cable fast charge lead for iPhone for samsung and you get 24/7 customer service. Technovate values your shopping experience, so if you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us, our efficient 24 hour customer service aims to provide you with the best shopping experience
